description: Perform a non-parametric Kruskal-Wallis One-Way ANOVA on the Insect Sprays dataset (/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/InsectSprays.csv). Use 'count' as the Continuous Dependent Variable and 'spray' as the Nominal Grouping Variable. The analysis must include DSCF pairwise comparisons and epsilon-squared effect size. Save the Jamovi project to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/InsectSprays_KruskalWallis.omv and create a text report at /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/kruskal_wallis_report.txt documenting the Chi-squared value, p-value, epsilon-squared effect size, and an identification of the most effective sprays based on the lowest counts.
